hero.subtitle: Computer Science Student — 1st year of bachelor
hero.description: Passionate about development and problem-solving. In my first year of computer science, I'm building my skills project by project.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a student at Epitech pursuing a Bachelor's degree, currently in my first year. I'm interested in computer science, with a particular attraction to cybersecurity and web development.
about.p2: I love learning by doing, through personal projects and platforms like TryHackMe or development exercises.
about.p3: I've also practiced several sports like tennis and ice hockey. They taught me rigor, long-term progression, and teamwork.
about.p4: Outside of that, I'm interested in music, video games, art, and motorsports, which are part of my daily life.

projets.title: Projects
projets.greenway: Creation of a website for an ecology association, aiming to make us practice eco-design
projets.tardis: Creation of a prediction model to predict SNCF delays
projets.confucius: Design of a Discord chatbot acting as a private tutor
projets.pentesting: Cybersecurity project on the Juice Shop website to master the OWASP top 10
projets.matchboite: MatchBoite is a web MVP allowing candidates and companies to discover each other through a swipe system
projets.nextbuy: In this project we seek to understand the dataset provided to us, and predict conclusions to help stores better interpret and improve the customer experience.

experiences.title: Experience
experiences.epitech: Computer science learning program covering: Web, Cybersecurity, Product design, AI, Data
experiences.hackaton_bpce: Hackathon organized by my school and BPCE to help BPCE find a solution to their problem. Our group finished 1st
experiences.stage: Looking for an internship in cybersecurity or web development for a duration of 1 month

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Let's work together
contact.description: Want to propose a project or just chat? Feel free to write to me.
contact.name: Your name
contact.success_msg: I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error: Error sending the message, please try again.
